title: malva hastata
intro: Malva hastata, also known as Cheeseweed or Wild Mallow, is a perennial herb native to Eastern North America. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Malva hastata include treating digestive issues, such as diarrhea and ulcers, as well as soothing sore throats and coughs. Malva hastata can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or topical cream, and is often used in folk remedies for its therapeutic properties.
